summary: Disputes UX Refonte - Iteration 129: All backend and frontend tests pass. Backend API enrichment verified (appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider, appointment_duration_minutes). Frontend DisputesListPage correctly groups disputes by appointment, shows global status badges, multiple disputes count, and 'Voir le rendez-vous' links. DisputeDetailPage shows enriched appointment context with date+time, duration, location, and appointment link.

backend_api_tests.test_03_disputes_mine_returns_new_fields: PASS - appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider, appointment_duration_minutes present
backend_api_tests.test_05_disputes_grouped_by_appointment: PASS - 2 disputes grouped under 'test dispute' appointment
backend_api_tests.test_06_dispute_detail_returns_new_field: PASS - Detail endpoint returns all enrichment fields

frontend_disputes_list_tests.appointment_context: PASS - Date (samedi 28 mars 2026 à 17:59), Duration (2 min), Location (6, Rue du Mont Thabor)

frontend_dispute_detail_tests.appointment_context_detail: PASS - Date+time, Duration, Location all visible

backend_enrichment_list_endpoint.description: GET /api/disputes/mine returns appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider, appointment_duration_minutes

backend_enrichment_detail_endpoint.description: GET /api/disputes/{id} returns same enrichment fields + appointment_id for link navigation

frontend_grouping_by_appointment.description: groupByAppointment function groups disputes by appointment_id into parent cards

frontend_global_status_logic.description: getGlobalStatus: 'Votre reponse attendue' if can_submit_position, 'En cours d'arbitrage' if arbitration, else 'En attente'

frontend_resolved_filtering.description: Resolved disputes (display_state='resolved') filtered out of main list

frontend_appointment_context_list.description: Parent card shows date+time, duration, type (physical/video), location/provider

frontend_appointment_context_detail.description: Detail page shows date+time, duration, type, location, and 'Voir le rendez-vous' link

critical_code_review_comments: Backend enrichment correctly implemented at dispute_routes.py lines 228-240 and 274-287
Frontend groupByAppointment function correctly groups disputes by appointment_id
Frontend getGlobalStatus correctly prioritizes can_submit_position > arbitration > waiting

All data-testid attributes present for testing (disputes-list-page, active-disputes-count, dispute-group-*, group-title-*, group-count-*, group-status-*, dispute-sub-card-*, view-appointment-*, dispute-detail-page, dispute-title, dispute-status-badge, dispute-detail-view-appointment-link)

test_credentials.user_1: igaal@hotmail.com / Test123! (has 4 disputes: 2 resolved, 2 active in arbitration)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Disputes UX Refonte verified. Key features: (1) Backend enrichment adds appointment_type, appointment_location, appointment_meeting_provider, appointment_duration_minutes to both /api/disputes/mine and /api/disputes/{id}, (2) Frontend DisputesListPage groups disputes by appointment_id with global status badges, (3) Frontend DisputeDetailPage shows enriched appointment context with 'Voir le rendez-vous' link, (4) Resolved disputes filtered out of main list. Test data: igaal@hotmail.com has 4 disputes (2 resolved, 2 active for 'test dispute' appointment).
data_discrepancy_note: Context mentioned 3 active disputes but actual data shows 2 active disputes. Both active disputes are for 'test dispute' appointment and are in arbitration state. This is correct behavior - the frontend correctly filters resolved disputes and groups by appointment.
